CL-02.title: Cookie Consent
CL-02.description: The website does not have a visible cookie consent banner informing users about the use of cookies.
CL-02.remediation: Implement a clear and conspicuous cookie consent banner to comply with GDPR regulations.

CL-03.title: Mobile Responsiveness
CL-03.description: The website is not fully responsive on mobile devices, affecting user experience.
CL-03.remediation: Optimize the website layout and design to ensure complete responsiveness across all devices.

CL-08.title: Clear Call-to-Action Buttons
CL-08.description: The website features clear and prominent call-to-action buttons for easy user navigation.

CL-12.title: Readability
CL-12.description: The website maintains good readability with appropriate font sizes and spacing for easy content consumption.

CL-15.title: Error Message Consistency
CL-15.description: The website maintains consistent error message formats for better user understanding.

CL-17.title: Social Media Integration
CL-17.description: The website integrates social media buttons for easy sharing and engagement.

CL-11.title: Consistent Design Language
CL-11.description: Maintain a consistent design language across all pages of the website.

CL-12.title: Responsive Layout
CL-12.description: Ensure the website layout is responsive and adapts to different screen sizes.

CL-13.title: Optimize Typography
CL-13.description: Optimize typography for readability and accessibility.
CL-13.remediation: Review font sizes, line spacing, and contrast ratios for optimal readability.

CL-14.title: Clear Call-to-Actions
CL-14.description: Ensure clear and prominent call-to-action buttons for effective user engagement.
CL-14.remediation: Enhance the visibility and clarity of call-to-action elements.

CL-06.title: Mobile Responsiveness
CL-06.description: Ensure that the website is fully responsive and functional across all devices
CL-06.remediation: Continue to test and optimize the website for different screen sizes and devices

CL-08.title: Consistent Design
CL-08.description: Maintain consistent design elements throughout the website.

CL-09.title: Color Contrast
CL-09.description: Ensure sufficient color contrast for text readability.
CL-09.remediation: Improve color contrast for better readability.

CL-10.title: Clear Call-to-Actions
CL-10.description: Use clear and prominent call-to-action buttons.

CL-12.title: Responsive Design
CL-12.description: Website should be responsive and work well across devices.

CL-11.description: Ensure the website is fully responsive across different devices and screen sizes.

CL-D0F019.title: Color Contrast
CL-D0F019.description: Ensure there is sufficient color contrast between text and background for readability.
CL-D0F019.remediation: Adjust the color scheme to meet WCAG standards for color contrast.

CL-D204A0.title: Consistent Design
CL-D204A0.description: Maintain consistency in design elements throughout the website.
